name: environment_cross_border_data_transfer_mesa_lib_eq
premise: Regulatory thresholds, downstream exposure, and operational limits are all time-sensitive. Regulatory thresholds, downstream exposure, and operational limits are all time-sensitive. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: environment cross border data transfer mesa lib eq. The moral tension is explicitly framed as liberty versus equality: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A union steward and a patient-family advocate are both on the bridge demanding incompatible assurances. Regulators are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; whatever you authorize now will be the documented first response. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident.

agents.name: Talia Park
agents.identity: I am Talia Park, the accountable decision-maker on this Environment bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes equality whenever someone invokes liberty.

agents.name: Elena Sato
agents.identity: I am Elena Sato, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so equality is not sacrificed by default just because liberty feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect equality.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The clock on this bridge is running out. With partial evidence, Talia Park must decide under liberty versus equality. What does Talia Park do?
